title: Prism Skill Source
description: Canonical source format for any Prism skill. Compiled to Claude SKILL.md or Codex AGENTS.md.

display_name.description: Human-readable skill name shown in UIs and logs.

description.description: 1-2 sentence description of what this skill does. Used in Claude frontmatter and Codex headers.

trigger_patterns.description: Regex or glob patterns that should activate this skill when matched against user input.

purpose.description: What problem this skill solves. 1-3 sentences, business-level language.

inputs.description: Inputs the skill expects when invoked.

type.description: Data type: string, number, boolean, object, array, filepath.

required.description: Whether this input is required for the skill to run.

description.description: What this input represents and how it should be provided.

outputs.description: Artifacts or values this skill produces.

type.description: Output type: file, string, json, markdown, void.

description.description: What this output contains and where it is written.

tool_restrictions.description: Tool access control for this skill. Maps to Claude allowed-tools and Codex sandbox modes.

allowed.description: Explicit list of allowed tool names. If empty, all tools are allowed.

denied.description: Explicit list of denied tool names. Takes precedence over allowed.

references.description: External files this skill reads or embeds.

path.description: Relative path from skill source file to the referenced file.

embed.description: If true, inline the file content into the compiled output. If false, emit a markdown link.

scripts.description: Bash scripts this skill invokes during execution.

path.description: Path to the script, relative to SKILL_DIR. Use $SKILL_DIR token.

when.description: Lifecycle hook: always, on_start, on_complete, on_error, or a stage name.

stages.description: Ordered execution stages within this skill.

description.description: What this stage does, in plain English.

auto_advance.description: If true, advance to next stage automatically on success. Default false.

rules.description: Behavioral constraints enforced during skill execution. Compiled into the Rules section.

examples.description: Invocation examples for documentation and onboarding.

input.description: Example user input or invocation args.

expected_behavior.description: What the skill should do when given this input.

eval_cases.description: Automated evaluation test cases for CI regression testing.

name.description: Short identifier for this test case.

input.description: Exact input to feed the skill.

expected_output_contains.description: Strings that MUST appear in the skill output.

expected_output_excludes.description: Strings that MUST NOT appear in the skill output.
